meta.title: Solon — Command the 2027 Election
meta.description: The intelligence platform built for Nigeria's most ambitious campaign. Simulator, voter data, agent coordination, finance compliance, war room.

hero.subheadline: The only platform that takes a Nigerian campaign from pre-election simulation all the way to election-night command. Built for the AFP 2027 cycle.

how_it_works.headline:
Model it. Coordinate it.
Win it.

steps.label: Before the campaign
steps.headline: Run every scenario before a single naira is spent.
steps.body: The Simulator models AFP's path to 50%+1 across all 36 states. Stress-test BVAS failures, youth turnout swings, coalition shifts. Know your vulnerabilities before your opponents find them.

steps.label: During the campaign
steps.headline: Know your voters. Reach them on their terms.
steps.body: Segment 93M registered voters into behavioural clusters. Deploy tailored messages on WhatsApp, SMS, and voice. Track agent coverage across 774 LGAs. Keep your spend inside INEC's cap.

steps.label: On election day
steps.headline: See everything. React to anything.
steps.body: The War Room streams live tally data from 176,847 polling units. Incidents surface in real time. Your AI Copilot answers questions faster than your advisors. You win or you know why you didn't.

modules.label: Simulator
modules.headline:
Model every scenario
before a single naira is spent.
modules.body: AI-driven presidential election modelling across 36 states. Stress-test turnout swings, BVAS failures, coalition collapses. Six-party race. 2023 baseline. Real margins.

modules.label: Voter Intel
modules.headline:
Know your voters
before you reach them.
modules.body: Segment 93M registered voters into behavioural clusters. Generate tailored WhatsApp, SMS, and voice messages. Map competitiveness tier by state in seconds.

modules.label: Agents
modules.headline:
Your agent network,
always in view.
modules.body: Track verification status, geographic coverage, and readiness scores for thousands of field agents. Spot gaps before election day and close them.

modules.label: Finance
modules.headline:
Campaign spend that
stays inside the law.
modules.body: Monitor total spend against INEC caps in real time. Track disbursements by category, flag approaching limits, generate compliance reports.

modules.label: War Room
modules.headline:
Command every polling unit
from one screen.
modules.body: Live tally feed, incident tracking, reconciliation alerts, AI Copilot. Everything you need on the day that decides everything.

war_room.headline:
The day that
decides everything.
war_room.body: Election day is not the time to figure out your tools. The War Room is a live command centre — streaming tally data, surfacing incidents, and putting an AI analyst in your ear from the moment polls open to the last result called.

cta.body: Explore every module with real data — no sign-up, no sales call, no waiting.

footer.legal: © 2026 Solon. Built for the AFP presidential campaign. All electoral data is illustrative.
